📋 CATEGORIZATION RULES IN USE
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
[1] QUESTIONS (Auto-respond with helpful answer)
    Triggers: how, what, where, cost, price, tools, start, timeline, ?

[2] PRAISE (Auto-respond with thanks)
    Triggers: amazing, awesome, incredible, inspiring, love, thank, great
    Emojis: ❤️ 🔥 💯 👏

[3] SPAM (Log only, do not respond)
    Triggers: crypto, bitcoin, ethereum, mlm, porn, buy now, click here
    Sketchy TLDs: .tk, .ml, .ga

[4] SALES (Flag for manual review)
    Triggers: partnership, collaboration, sponsor, affiliate, work together
